shell.signInHint: Sign in with manager credentials to access scheduling, entity management, and analytics modules.

login.sessionActive: Session is active for this workspace.
login.signinSubtitle: Use your account to manage school timetable data.

home.title: School workspace
home.subtitle: Manage schedule, entities, and teacher workload.

curriculum.title: Curriculum plan
curriculum.subtitle: Weekly hours per class and subject — feeds validation and draft generation.

workspace.title: Atlas: School Timetable MVP
workspace.subtitle: Single-page forms for teachers, rooms, classes, flows, and curriculum.
workspace.signInHint: Sign in with manager or admin credentials to load and edit school data.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Dense lesson grid, conflict control and real-time validation.
schedule.switchConfirm: There are unsaved changes. Switch class and reset local draft?
schedule.empty: No classes available for schedule editing.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Teacher profiles, subjects, and workload constraints.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.subtitle: Capacity, specialization and classroom resources availability.

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Class groups and student counts for scheduling.

flows.title: Flows
flows.subtitle: Cross-class educational streams for shared lessons.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Workload, conflict and schedule quality control.

import.title: Import data
import.subtitle: Download an Excel template, fill it in and upload back to populate the school data.

imports.title: Excel data import
imports.subtitle: Template-driven workflow: download, fill, validate, then commit. Nothing is written until you confirm.
imports.step1Subtitle: One sheet per entity with column hints. Edit in Excel/Numbers/Google Sheets.
imports.step2Subtitle: We will parse the file, check natural keys and show a preview of changes.
imports.templateFailed: Could not download the template. Sign in as manager/admin and try again.
imports.validateFailed: Workbook check failed. Make sure the file is a valid .xlsx.
imports.commitBlocked: Cannot apply: there are errors to fix.
imports.commitFailed: Apply failed. Database was rolled back.
imports.fixErrorsFirst: Fix the errors above before applying.
imports.authRequired: Sign in as manager or admin first.

overview.teacherLoadRiskSubtitle: Overloaded teachers and top priority fixes.
overview.qualitySubtitle: Current quality snapshot from validation penalty model.
overview.qualityUnavailable: Quality analytics could not be loaded.
overview.readonlySubtitle: Dashboard is informational only. Use dedicated pages for editing schedule, teachers, classrooms, classes, and flows.
overview.planCoverageSubtitle: How well the saved schedule matches weekly plan hours.
overview.planCoverageLine: {fill}% filled — {rows} plan row(s), {missing} class(es) with no curriculum rows.
overview.planCoverageUnavailable: Plan coverage could not be loaded.

analytics.title: Teacher workload analytics
analytics.subtitle: Monitor current load, limit usage and window count by teacher.
analytics.empty: No analytics data for this filter.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Manage teacher profile, subjects and weekly constraints.

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Track class groups and total student counts.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.subtitle: Maintain room capacities and specialization types.

curriculum.title: Weekly curriculum
curriculum.subtitle: Set hours per week for each class and subject. Schedule builder uses this for plan checks and class draft.
curriculum.summaryLine: {rows} plan row(s), fill {fill}%, classes without any plan row: {missing}.
curriculum.invalidHours: Enter a valid hours value (at least 1).
curriculum.noClasses: Create at least one class before adding curriculum rows.
curriculum.emptyClass: No curriculum rows for this class yet.
curriculum.snapshotHelp: School-wide snapshot: curriculum rows vs lessons in the saved schedule.

flows.title: Grouped flows
flows.subtitle: Compose cross-class streams used for schedule planning.

schedule.hasValidationErrors: Validation errors found. Fix them before saving.
schedule.noSuggestion: No error-free slot + classroom combinations. Change subject or teacher.
schedule.cannotResolveSlot: Could not resolve grid cell for suggested slot.
schedule.slotSuggested: Slot suggested (penalty {penalty}). You can undo this action.
schedule.suggestFailed: Could not get suggestions. Check network and permissions.
schedule.saveBeforeGenerate: Save or reset unsaved changes first. Generation uses saved school schedule.
schedule.confirmGenerate: Add missing lessons from curriculum plan to draft for this class? Occupied cells will not be overwritten.
schedule.generateFailed: Could not generate draft. Set curriculum plan (hours by subject) and save schedule.
schedule.generateDraftSummary: Draft updated: {added} of {total} placement(s) applied.{unplacedNote} Review the grid and save.
schedule.generateAuthExpired: Your session expired or you are not signed in. Sign in again, then retry “Fill by plan (draft)”.
schedule.generateForbidden: This action is not allowed for your role or the selected school.
schedule.dropValidateFailed: Could not validate the lesson (network or session). Try again or sign back in.
schedule.exportFailed: Could not export schedule to Excel.
schedule.globalValidation: Conflict validation across the whole school
schedule.saveBeforeSuggestions: Save draft first: suggestions are calculated from server data.
schedule.pickBestSlot: Pick best slot and room (minimum warning penalty)
schedule.fillByPlanHint: Add missing lessons by curriculum hours plan (empty cells only)
schedule.confirmTeacherAbsentDraft: Generate a draft for teacher absence: {teacher}?
schedule.scenarioApplied: Scenario draft applied to local grid. Review and save.
schedule.schoolSolverDraftOnly: School solver: draft only (do not auto-save)
schedule.confirmShortenedDay: Remove lessons after period N on selected day?
schedule.solverEmptyNoCurriculum: No curriculum (hours per subject) is configured for this class.
schedule.solverEmptyNoGaps: Plan hours are already in the database — there is nothing to add.
schedule.confirmSolverRun: Generate for «{scope}»? Plan rows still under target: {under}. (Fills missing hours only — does not move existing lessons.)
schedule.solverSchoolSaved: {strategy}: whole school saved to database — {count} operations (+{created} / ~{updated}). Switch class in the picker to review each grid.
schedule.solverClassDraftHint: Applied to local draft — click Save changes to persist.
schedule.solverPersistFailed: Solver finished but saving to the database failed. Try again.
schedule.fillGapsHint: Adds only missing plan hours (does not rebuild the full timetable).
schedule.fromPlanHint: Clears the scope and rebuilds the full timetable from the curriculum plan.
schedule.confirmRegenerateStep1: This will clear the schedule in scope (server) and rebuild from the curriculum plan. Continue?
schedule.confirmRegenerateStep2: Final confirmation: existing lessons in scope will be removed before generation. Proceed?
schedule.shortcuts: Ctrl/Cmd+S Save • Del Clear • Esc Cancel • Ctrl/Cmd+Z Undo
schedule.subject: Subject
schedule.pickLessonCard: Select a lesson card in the grid.
schedule.noCardsByFilter: No cards for the current filter.
schedule.conflictsPanelSource: Live checks from the schedule validation API (database + draft), not canned demo text.
schedule.conflictsFilteredEmpty: Nothing listed for this class. Turn on "Show whole school" to see all warnings.
schedule.gridHint: Drag from the pool into a cell. Colors show validation for that slot.
schedule.validationHint: Checks run across the whole school while you edit.
